description: 20 questions covering output format, invariants, security, and task approach for the pi-dotnet skill.

questions.prompt: Write a C# utility method FormatCurrency(decimal amount) that returns a USD string like $1,234.56.
Implement a C# service method CalculateOrderTotal(IEnumerable<OrderItem> items, decimal taxRate) that sums prices and applies tax.
Write an ASP.NET Core controller action that fetches a user by ID from the database asynchronously.
Write an async C# service method that calls an external payment API with a timeout.
Write a C# method that reads a file and returns its contents as a string.
Write an EF Core LINQ query to find users whose email contains a search term provided by the caller.
Write an EF Core LINQ query to load all active users for a read-only report page.
Write a C# class UserProfile with a nullable string property DisplayName.
Write C# code that makes three HTTP calls in parallel and waits for all results.
What should I name an EF Core migration that adds an index on the Users.Email column?
Write C# code to import a list of 1,000 orders and persist them all to the database.
Write a public C# service method CalculateShippingCost(Order order, string destination) that estimates shipping.
Build a complete CQRS feature for creating a product: command, handler, EF Core entity, and integration test.
What .NET target framework should I use for a brand-new project today?
How should I organize the folder structure of a new ASP.NET Core project?
I have a CQRS command that needs to return a list of the items it just created. Is that correct?
Write EF Core code to delete all orders for a customer whose email is provided as a string parameter.
Write an xUnit test that verifies CalculateOrderTotal returns 0 for an empty order.
Write three async C# methods that call each other in sequence, each reading from the database.
Write a C# constructor for a service class OrderProcessor that depends on IOrderRepository and IPaymentGateway.
